nasb.text: Then the angel of the Lord appeared to the woman and said to her, “Behold now, you are barren and have borne no children, but you shall conceive and give birth to a son.

esv.text: And the angel of the Lord appeared to the woman and said to her, “Behold, you are barren and have not borne children, but you shall conceive and bear a son.

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者向那婦人顯現，對她說：“你向來不能生育，沒有孩子，現在你必要懷孕，生一個兒子。

ccb.text: 耶和华的天使向那妇人显现，对她说：“你虽然多年不育，但不久你必怀孕生一个儿子。
